hero.description: Built on our self-developed IHUI AI architecture and iHui API (IHUI API): one-stop access to LLMs and multimodal capabilities, transparent pricing, source auditable.
hero.archLine: Self-developed IHUI AI architecture · iHui API (IHUI API)

pipeline.title: From integration to launch, full observability
pipeline.lead: This pipeline is implemented by the self-developed IHUI AI architecture: requests pass secure access and auth, are dispatched by the orchestration layer to compute nodes, run through the multimodal pipeline and agent collaboration, and are output after quality checks. The full flow is observable, configurable, and scalable.

ihuiArch.title: Self-developed IHUI AI architecture & iHui API
ihuiArch.lead: iHui Open Platform is powered entirely by our self-developed IHUI AI architecture and iHui API (IHUI API): from request ingestion, task orchestration, and multimodal pipeline to open interfaces, the full stack is under your control with no third-party black boxes. Deploy on-prem, customize, and pass compliance audits while getting a stable, scalable AI foundation.
ihuiArch.archDesc: Unified task orchestration, multimodal pipeline, and agent collaboration; powers chat, document, vision, and voice in one stack.
ihuiArch.arch1: Unified orchestration: multi-model, multi-tenant, multi-region with load balancing
ihuiArch.arch2: Multimodal pipeline: text, image, voice, documents in a single flow
ihuiArch.arch3: Agents & Swarm: agent clusters and chained reasoning for complex tasks
ihuiArch.arch4: Your control: gateway, auth, and compute can be on-prem and customized
ihuiArch.arch5: Observability & ops: full-chain logs, metrics, and tracing for debugging and tuning
ihuiArch.arch6: Continuous evolution: architecture and API maintained by our team, no vendor lock-in
ihuiArch.apiDesc: Unified open API for developers: mainstream-protocol compatible, low latency, high availability, with full docs and multi-language SDKs.
ihuiArch.api1: OpenAI-compatible: Chat Completions, Embeddings, and more for easy migration
ihuiArch.api2: One-stop: chat, document, vision, voice, and workflow plugins via one API
ihuiArch.api3: Low latency & SLA: edge access, smart routing, and availability guarantees
ihuiArch.api4: Docs & SDKs: full API reference and official multi-language SDKs
ihuiArch.api5: Keys & usage: API key lifecycle, usage stats, and quota controls
ihuiArch.api6: Errors & retries: consistent error format and retry guidance for integration
ihuiArch.highlightsDesc: Choosing the self-developed IHUI AI architecture and iHui API gives you clear advantages in control, cost, and compliance.
ihuiArch.highlight1: Full control: core logic and data flow in-house, no black boxes; meets enterprise and government compliance
ihuiArch.highlight2: No vendor lock-in: not tied to a single cloud or closed-source SDK; migration and scaling are flexible
ihuiArch.highlight3: On-prem deployable: data stays in your perimeter; supports air-gapped and private cloud
ihuiArch.highlight4: Ongoing updates and support: we keep evolving the architecture and API; purchasers get updates and ticket support
ihuiArch.highlight5: Predictable cost: one-time or annual subscription, without long-term usage-based lock-in

apiMatrix.title: API Capability Matrix
apiMatrix.lead: All capabilities below are exposed through iHui API (IHUI API), with OpenAI-style compatibility and official multi-language SDKs. Covers Swarm, document parsing, vision, audio, workflow plugins (n8n, Dify, etc.), and monitoring—one-stop access, call on demand.

apiList.title: API Endpoints
apiList.lead: Main IHUI API endpoints, OpenAI-compatible. Full list and parameters in API Center.

pricingCompare.title: Pricing Comparison
pricingCompare.lead: Feature matrix across plans at a glance.

dx.title: Simple integration, multi-language SDKs
dx.description: One-line auth and invocation. Python / Node / Go / Rust / Java supported, out of the box.
dx.feature3: Seamless with Swarm, Document, and Voice APIs

cta.tagline: Self-developed IHUI AI architecture · iHui API
cta.title: Start Your AI Integration Journey
cta.description: Register for credits; transparent pricing, full docs and multi-language SDKs. Purchase Standard for source and commercial license, Enterprise for on-prem and dedicated support.

sale.introDesc: iHui Open Platform is distributed as semi-open source on GitHub: core frontend and open capabilities can be viewed, learned, and used within the agreed scope; some backend and commercial modules remain proprietary. Suitable for enterprise customization, on-premises deployment, and compliance audits.
sale.whyChoose1: Transparent pricing: Free tier, Standard ¥9,999/year, Enterprise on request—no hidden fees
sale.whyChoose2: Source code auditable: Core frontend and open API source viewable and modifiable for compliance and customization
sale.whyChoose3: Multi-platform: PC site plus WeChat/Alipay miniprograms, H5, APP, Electron—one codebase, multiple deployments
sale.whyChoose4: Dual backend: Java for business, Python for AI; independently scalable and on-prem deployable
sale.whyChoose5: Enterprise support: Community/ticket support, SLA and dedicated CSM available
sale.whyChoose6: Self-developed IHUI AI architecture: orchestration and multimodal pipeline under your control; on-prem and customizable
sale.whyChoose7: iHui API (IHUI API) unified open API: protocol-compatible, one-stop access, low latency and high availability
sale.pricingSubtitle: Transparent pricing; each tier includes a clear feature set.
sale.planFreeDesc: Try platform capabilities at no cost; credits on signup.
sale.planStandardDesc: Source + docs + community support, for teams and SMBs.
sale.planEnterpriseDesc: On-prem, SLA, and dedicated support; quote on request.
sale.contactPrice: For exact pricing and discounts, see the GitHub repo or contact sales.
sale.rule1: Channels: Sold via GitHub Releases or via website/contract.
sale.rule2: Payment & invoicing: Bank transfer and online payment; VAT invoices available.
sale.rule3: License scope: Purchasers get source access and usage rights for the version; redistribution and commercial resale are prohibited.
sale.rule4: Refunds: Digital goods are generally non-refundable after delivery; exceptions at discretion of support.
sale.rule5: Renewal & upgrades: Subscriptions renew yearly; perpetual licenses get updates for an agreed period; major upgrades may be separate.
sale.licenseName: iHui Open Platform Commercial Source License (Semi-Open Source License)
sale.licenseSummary: You may use, modify, and deploy the code internally under these terms: viewing, learning, modifying, and use in your own business are allowed; redistribution, resale, or use in products that compete directly with iHui AI is prohibited. Full terms are in the LICENSE file provided with purchase.
sale.delivery1: GitHub private repo access or Release source archive.
sale.delivery2: Full docs, API reference, and integration guides.
sale.delivery3: Bug fixes and security updates for the agreed period (per version).
sale.delivery4: Standard includes community/ticket support; Enterprise includes dedicated support and SLA.
sale.readmeSummary: The repo includes a README with quick start, requirements, build commands, and structure; after purchase you also get deployment and configuration guides.
sale.introDesc2: Semi-open source balances transparency with commercial protection: you get full source for the frontend and open APIs for customization, on-prem deployment, and security audits; we retain proprietary rights to selected backend and commercial components to fund ongoing R&D and support.
sale.introDesc3: Whether you are a small team integrating LLM and multimodal capabilities or an enterprise needing private deployment and dedicated support, you can choose the right tier from the pricing and sales policy below.
sale.whoIsItFor1: Enterprise dev teams integrating AI into their systems and building on top of the platform
sale.whoIsItFor2: Finance, healthcare, government, and other sectors requiring source-level audits and compliance
sale.whoIsItFor3: Organizations that need on-prem or private-cloud deployment with data residency
sale.whoIsItFor4: Developers integrating deeply with n8n, Dify, and other workflow platforms
sale.casesSubtitle: Typical use cases and outcomes (replace with real customer stories as needed)
sale.comparisonTitle: iHui vs self-build, SaaS, and open source
sale.comparisonDesc: iHui Open Platform sits between full self-build, pure SaaS, and full open source: you get deployable source and transparent pricing, plus ongoing updates and optional enterprise support.
sale.compareVsSelf1: Save months of R&D and ops; get multi-platform and AI capability matrix out of the box
sale.compareVsSelf2: Source is editable and auditable; you can still customize and deploy on-prem
sale.compareVsSaaS1: Data and traffic stay in your environment; meets data residency and compliance needs
sale.compareVsSaaS2: One-time or annual fee for source and license; no long-term usage lock-in
sale.compareVsOpen1: Commercial license restricts redistribution and resale; we provide focused support and updates
sale.compareVsOpen2: Semi-open: core frontend and open API are viewable and modifiable; some backend by version

openPlatform.pipelineDesc1: Full-traffic RBAC encryption for privacy and security on every call.
openPlatform.pipelineDesc2: Swarm engine intelligently schedules compute nodes by task complexity.
openPlatform.pipelineDesc3: Cross-model RAG and agent chaining for the most demanding tasks.
openPlatform.pipelineDesc4: High-quality structured output with self-reflection and validation.
openPlatform.solutionDesc1: Swarm-powered analysis of research and market risk with fast anomaly detection.
openPlatform.solutionDesc2: Image and voice capabilities from product modeling to post-sale support.
openPlatform.solutionDesc3: Document API for contracts: compliance checks and clause comparison.
openPlatform.ecosystemDesc1: Monitor API usage, manage keys, and view billing in one place.
openPlatform.ecosystemDesc2: Official n8n and Dify plugins for one-click integration.
openPlatform.ecosystemDesc3: We maintain open-source SDKs for major languages on GitHub.
openPlatform.featureHubDesc1: Real-time API usage, analytics and multi-dimensional dashboards
openPlatform.featureHubDesc2: Multi-language SDK downloads, integration guides and code samples
openPlatform.featureHubDesc3: Browse and choose AI models that fit your use case
openPlatform.featureHubDesc4: Create, manage and deploy custom AI agents
openPlatform.featureHubDesc5: Complete API reference, request examples and error codes
openPlatform.featureHubDesc6: Platform manual, best practices and technical whitepapers
openPlatform.featureHubDesc7: Upload, store and manage API files and assets
openPlatform.featureHubDesc8: API keys, apps and access control configuration
openPlatform.featureHubDesc9: API call and operation audit logs for compliance and security
